I have studied in this school for 14years of my life till class 12 and as far as my honest review is concerned it is the Worst school in Kolkata never join this if you want to  have a peaceful life ,,, Science Department is very disappointing,, lack of well educated qualified faculties with zero knowledge about concepts... Higher Secondary education in specifically science is worst.
Debosmita Mam(Class Teacher of 11 Science and Chemistry techer ): The Enigma of Oversmartness

In the realm of oversmartness, behold Debosmita Mam,
A graduate in physics, but a chemistry teacher, damn!
With a touch of mystery, she turned the subject into a haze,
Leaving our foundations crumbling, lost in a bewildering maze.

From backbenchers to the first row, she led the way,
But her teaching prowess seemed dull, lacking a vibrant display.
She gossiped with every teacher, complaining about trivial strife,
Yet when faced with new questions, she stood dumb, devoid of life.

She spoke like a hornbill, her words loud and unclear,
Scribbling concepts on the board, in haste they did appear.
But alas, too fast to note, as if a deliberate ploy,
For what she wrote was nothing but a heap of decoy.

Confidence overflowed, as she taught us to be like her,
Overconfident in our understanding, a perilous blur.
An incredible liar, her words twisted, tangled and bent,
A woeful actor, her performance leaving hearts discontent.

For science students, she proved to be a career destroyer,
Leading us astray, our dreams left in a state of disarray.
Yet amidst the chaos, we shall rise and find our own way,
Undeterred by her follies, we'll strive for a brighter day.

So let us remember Debosmita Mam, the queen of oversmart,
A reminder that resilience and truth shall never depart.
Through her shortcomings, we'll uncover our own worth,
And forge ahead, seeking knowledge's infinite girth.
Spent 14years in MVM but till date my second home and the friendly feeling has been coming from junior ... Till date I have a feeling that the teachers are guiding me.... 😍🏤👍

Very good institution. Teachers are very friendly and helpful. Overall environment is very healthy. Have had the best years of my life here and definitely recommending it to juniors for better education and bonding with peers and mentors.❤

Maharishi Vidya Mandir is a chain of schools founded by Maharishi Mahesh Yogi. The school in Bansdroni, Kolkata is one of the branches of Maharishi Vidya Mandir.

Maharishi Vidya Mandir Bansdroni Kolkata is a co-educational English medium school that offers education from nursery to class XII. The school aims to provide a value-based education that promotes academic excellence, physical fitness, and spiritual development.

The school has a well-qualified and experienced faculty who are committed to providing quality education to their students. The curriculum is designed to promote holistic development, and the school offers a range of extracurricular activities such as music, dance, sports, and art.

In addition to academics, Maharishi Vidya Mandir Bansdroni Kolkata also focuses on character-building, moral values, and personality development of its students. The school has a well-equipped library, computer lab, and science lab to facilitate learning.

Overall, Maharishi Vidya Mandir Bansdroni Kolkata is a reputed school that provides a nurturing environment for the holistic development of its students.
